originalTitle: PufferLib - Sample efficiency in the dumbest way possible
title: Analyzing Breakout Sample Efficiency and Planning Sweep Tooling Improvements
summary: Analyzed sample efficiency of PufferLib on Breakout with no frame skip, noting a high score of 827 at 20 million frames. Discussed hyperparameter tuning results, issues with scaling update epochs, and planned to improve distributed sweep tooling for faster experimentation.
